title: Recoverable delete windows
rule: Stateful services must enable point-in-time recovery and respect provider name-reservation windows after deletion.

title: Cold-start SLO
rule: Latency-sensitive serverless workloads pin min_instances >= 1 to meet the 300ms p95 cold-start SLO.

title: Private services require a VPC
rule: Any private-IP service requires an explicit VPC network resource in the same plan.

title: Immutable resource naming
rule: Resources with name-reservation semantics append a stable entropy suffix to avoid recreation collisions.
